results.rendered_html:
ādṛta p. p.
1 Honoured, respected.
2 (Used actively) (a) Zealous, diligent, earnest; ādṛtataramavocat  K. 211 , 170 ;  Ku. 7. 30.  (b) Attentive, careful; daṃḍanītyāṃ nātyādṛto'bhūt  Dk. 154.  (c) Respectful (sādara); ityādṛtena kathitau  R. 13. 72 ; iti sma pṛcchatyanuvelamādṛtaḥ 3. 5  respectfully or earnestly;  Ms. 11. 226 , 7. 150.
